notes: MiniMax M2.7 AutoRound W4A16 on 4x Intel Arc Pro B70 via vLLM/XPU TP4. Refreshed larger-context capacity datapoint with max_model_len=8192 and gpu_memory_utilization=0.95 after compile/cache warmup. FP16 activations, fast ext4 NVMe model path, installed B70 MoE config, experimental llm-scaler u4 decode-only ESIMD INT4 MoE path, XPU graph disabled, no speculative decode, no power-limit change. This rerun reports 33,408 GPU KV-cache tokens and improves the earlier same-shape 8192 row from 33.31 to 36.81 output tok/s.

engineFlags.commandSnippet: VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1 CCL_IPC=default XPU_GRAPH=0 vllm bench throughput --backend vllm --model /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --tokenizer /mnt/fast-ai/llm-models/minimax-m2.7-int4-autoround --trust-remote-code --dtype float16 --tensor-parallel-size 4 --distributed-executor-backend mp --max-model-len 8192 --max-num-batched-tokens 1024 --max-num-seqs 1 --dataset-name random --random-input-len 512 --random-output-len 1536 --random-range-ratio 0 --num-prompts 1 --disable-log-stats --gpu-memory-utilization 0.95
engineFlags.extraFlags: XPU/Level Zero; CCL_ATL_TRANSPORT=ofi; CCL_TOPO_P2P_ACCESS=1; CCL_ZE_IPC_EXCHANGE unset/default; VLLM_XPU_ENABLE_XPU_GRAPH=0; VLLM_XPU_USE_LLM_SCALER_MOE=1; PYTHONPATH includes /home/steve/src/llm-scaler/vllm/custom-esimd-kernels-vllm/python; dtype=float16; llm-scaler u4 decode-only patch; installed B70 MoE config; GPU KV cache 33408 tokens; maximum concurrency 4.08x for 8192-token requests; model loading memory 28.11 GiB
